use_cases: Triggering form submissions with customizable variants for different action priorities
Creating navigation CTAs with ghost and link variants for subtle interactions
Building icon-only buttons for toolbars and compact UI areas
Implementing destructive actions with the destructive variant styling
Creating outlined secondary actions that don't compete with primary CTAs
ai_summary: A flexible, accessible Button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority. Supports 6 visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes with proper focus-visible states, disabled handling, and shadow effects. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling and supports composition via asChild prop for integrating with other Radix primitives.
